title: geum rivale var. subalpinum
intro: Geum rivale var. subalpinum, also known as the alpine avens, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Geum rivale var. subalpinum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Geum rivale var. subalpinum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
